programme.title: Songs Of Praise
programme.desc: Inspiring hymns and songs, together with uplifting stories of faith from around the UK and beyond.

programme.title: Ainsley's Great Garden Cook Off
programme.desc: National treasure Ainsley Harriott challenges some of Britain's best chefs to make inspiring meals from ingredients available in and around a stunning selection of National Trust properties.

programme.title: Q+A With Jack Tame
programme.desc: Hosted by Jack Tame, Q+A brings viewers the important political interviews and discussions of the week, taking a close look at politics, economics, and global events.

programme.title: Border Patrol
programme.desc: Immigration officers interview a man matching the profile of a suspected drug smuggler, and it’s ‘Goodbye Pork Pie’ at Biosecurity NZ.

programme.title: Marae
programme.desc: Your way in to the Māori world and the issues that matter. Māiatanga, Whanaungatanga, Manaakitanga - We bring you stories with heart.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off Extra Slice
programme.desc: Stephen Mangan joins Jo Brand and Tom Allen to digest all the drama from Biscuit Week. Whose crunch packed a punch, and who had a soggy setback?

programme.title: Find My Country House
programme.desc: Aussie homebuyers who love the tranquillity of country life find their perfect country house out in the Australian bush.

programme.title: Here We Go
programme.desc: Season Finale: When Robin's attempt to stop Cherry's wedding in Scotland fails, the Jessop family holiday is in tatters.

programme.title: Here We Go
programme.desc: Season Premiere: Amy is home for the holidays, and Rachel is determined to create a classic Jessop family Christmas.

programme.title: Chateau DIY at Christmas
programme.desc: Donna and Paul have one large restoration project to complete before hosting a festive party. Chris and Jolyon go the extra mile to make their Christmas celebrations perfect.

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7
programme.desc: Lion numbers continue to grow, but there’s not enough food to go around. A lioness mum risks her life to feed her five cubs. And Xudum’s newborn leopard cubs face a deadly threat.

programme.title: Grand Designs New Zealand
programme.desc: Season Premiere: A well-resourced couple who fall in love with a rundown Central Otago “castle” find restoring a heritage building is anything but romantic.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing! Hosted by Bradley Walsh.

programme.title: 1News At Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: Three brothers return home to supercharge the families’ Nelson market garden, growing & selling fresh produce for wholesalers & their own thriving food store.

programme.title: Grand Designs New Zealand
programme.desc: In the Western Bay of Plenty, a Modernist-inspired house with its own art gallery is the brainchild of a cement industry veteran who came to architecture later in life.

programme.title: My Family Mystery
programme.desc: Sonia and her team of experts discover the truth behind the mystery man in the photograph. Who is he and was he a bigamist?

programme.title: Britain's Most Expensive Houses
programme.desc: Agent David hopes to capture London's elite with two lavishly luxury chalets in Val d'Isère. And Fine & Country agent Margaret's £10m Hertfordshire mansion catches Hollywood's eye.

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: Alcaras struggles to balance work and home life and must make a difficult choice.

programme.title: Q+A With Jack Tame
programme.desc: Hosted by Jack Tame, Q+A brings viewers the important political interviews and discussions of the week, taking a close look at politics, economics, and global events.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Start your day off right as the Breakfast team brings you all the latest in news, weather, sport and entertainment.

programme.title: Riddiculous
programme.desc: Ranvir Singh hosts three teams who will go head-to-head over a series of Riddiculous riddles set by Riddlemaster Henry Lewis!

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hope of winning its £10,000 jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: With thousands in cash at stake, four strangers must go head to head with a ruthless quiz genius who’s determined to send them home with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Go Girls
programme.desc: Christmas is a time of joy and togetherness, but Cody faces fallout, Kevin plays with fire, and Britta sees flaws in her true love.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal UK
programme.desc: Join host Stephen Mulhern for one of the most exciting and iconic gameshows of all time as one of his brave contestants takes on the infamous Banker for a life-changing cash prize.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it deal or no deal?

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing! Hosted by Bradley Walsh.

programme.title: 1News At Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Seven Sharp
programme.desc: Join Hilary Barry, Jeremy Wells and the team for a fresh perspective on today's stories.

programme.title: Amanda & Alan's Greek Job
programme.desc: Amanda and Alan face the daunting task of transforming the main ground floor room, which resembles a dreary barn, into a Greek-chic living and dining area.

programme.title: Can You Keep A Secret?
programme.desc: Debbie bans William from chocolate and Harry from sharing their secret with Neha. But someone else now knows about William – and wants a cut of the cash. Who could it be?

programme.title: Snow Patrol NZ
programme.desc: Maurucio’s bone-breaking fall triggers a medical emergency. Brendan cops a snowball to the face and now his holiday hangs in the balance. And Arlo’s collision leaves him dazed and confused.

programme.title: Twenty Twenty Six
programme.desc: A new environmental report on global heating causes temperatures to rise in the Oversight Team as they try to find ways to combat not only the report but global heating itself.

programme.title: Would I Lie To You?
programme.desc: Host Rob Brydon and the team captains, David Mitchell and Lee Mack, are joined by guests Bruno Tonioli, Adam Buxton, Kirsty Wark and Rob Beckett.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it deal or no deal?

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Cody's triggered.

programme.title: The Secret Genius Of Modern Life
programme.desc: Season Finale: Hannah goes behind the scenes to look at the technology behind the lift, entering a 246m high lift shaft to test everything from the brakes to her own fear of heights.

programme.title: Secrets Of The London Underground
programme.desc: Tim and Siddy meet at Gloucester Road in London's museum quarter, a station serving the Circle, District, and Piccadilly lines.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.
